title: Teleshopping
desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Circus Car 2
desc: A group of young friends, keen on having a paranormal experience, ventures into a forest. They soon stumble upon an abandoned vehicle that appears to be possessed by an entity.

title: Bhairavakona
desc: After committing a robbery, Basava and his companion, John, run into Agraharam Geetha, a stranger, and the trio end up in Bhairavakona, a village shrouded in mystery.

title: Mumbai Ki Kiran Bedi
desc: When an IPS officer is killed by a criminal gang, her father meets her lookalike. He then decides to train her to be just like his daughter in order to avenge her death.

title: Rowdy No. 1
desc: Maruthu falls in love with Bhagyalakshmi. He finds out that her mother was assassinated by a corrupt politician and sets out to avenge her death.

title: Gangaajal
desc: IPS Amit Kumar, an honest police officer, is tasked with curbing Tezpur's rampant crime rates. Here he must work with his fellow corrupt officers and deal with the town's insidious political figures.
